negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_108
prompt: The video opens with a group of people riding horses along a dirt path in a rural, sunny setting. The riders are dressed in casual attire, including cowboy hats and plaid shirts, and are accompanied by children wearing similar hats. The horses are brown with white markings on their faces, and they are equipped with saddles and reins. The path is flanked by lush green vegetation, including tall grasses and bushes, and the background features a mix of open fields and scattered trees under a partly cloudy sky. The riders appear relaxed and engaged in conversation as they move forward at a steady pace. As the video progresses, the group continues along the path, maintaining their formation and enjoying the peaceful surroundings. The final frame shows the riders still moving forward, with the same serene countryside backdrop, indicating a continuous and tranquil journey. A medium shot of a group of people riding horses along a dirt path in a rural setting.
